steps.title: Set up and simplify the fraction
steps.content:
Apply the percentage formula to find what percent 528,000 is of 600,000:
$$\frac{528,000}{600,000} \times 100$$
Cancel the thousands and simplify by dividing both numerator and denominator by their GCD of 24:
$$\frac{528}{600} = \frac{22}{25}$$

steps.title: Convert the fraction to percentage
steps.content:
Convert $\frac{22}{25}$ to a percentage by multiplying numerator and denominator by 4:
$$\frac{22}{25} = \frac{88}{100} = 88\%$$
D is correct.
